title: Protocol SAM-Seq  A.Thaliana
steps: Starting material: 1g of powder ( Aerial part of ~17 days seedling ) Add the powder to 25 ml of Extraction Buffer (EB) 1 in a 50 ml falcon tube. Let sit on ice for 5 min.
Add 1% Formaldehyde for crosslinking (i.e. 675 µl Formaldehyde 37% in 25ml of EB1). Incubate 5 minutes
Add 1.25 M glycine to stop the crosslinking (i.e. 1.7ml of Glycine 2M per 675 µl Formaldehyde 37%)
Filter the solution through Miracloth into a new 50 ml falcon tube. Repeat once.
Filter the solution through a 0.4µm filter into a new 50 ml falcon tube.
Centrifuge the filtered solution for 20 minutes at 4,000 rpm at 4°C.
Gently remove supernatant and resuspend the pellet in 2 ml of Extraction Buffer (EB) 2. Transfer the solution into four 1.5ml Eppendorf tubes.
Centrifuge at 12,000 g for 10 minutes at 4°C. Repeat step 7 & 8 once
Remove supernatant and resuspend each pellet in 300µl of Extraction Buffer (EB) 3.
In a clean Eppendorf tube, add 300ul of EB3. Take the 300µl solution (resuspended pellet) from step 7 and carefully layer it on top of the clean 300µl of EB3.
Centrifuge for 45 min at 12,000 at 4 degrees.
Resuspend each chromatin pellet in 300µl Nuclear Preparation Buffer (NPB) and incubate on ice for 5 min
Spin down nuclei at 1000g for 5 min at 4°C and resuspend in Plant-Tween-Wash-Buffer (PTWB).
Resuspend each pellet in 193.5 µl 1X rCutSmart, containing 5µl SAM and 1.5µl EcoGII (i.e. 3.75U for 100µl). Incubate 30 minutes at 30°C
Add 200 µl rSmartCut 1X + 20 µl NaCl (5M) and incubate overnight at 65 °C (or 1h30min if not crosslinked).
Add 5µl of RNAse A (20mg/ml) and 2µl Proteinase K. Incubate 30 minutes at 42°C.
Add 1 volume of 1:1 phenol:chloroform (i.e. 400µl)
Recover the aqueous phase (upper) in a new LoBind Eppendorf tube
Add 1 volume of chloroform (i.e. 400µl)
Centrifuge at 12,000 g for 10 minutes at 4°C.
Recover aqueous phase (upper) in a new LoBind Eppendorf tube
Precipitate DNA by adding 1/10 volume of NaAcétate 3M pH5,2 + 2,5 volume of EtOH 100%
Incubate at –20°C from 45 minutes to overnight.
Centrifuge at 12000g for 30 minutes at 4°C to precipitate DNA.
Wash the pellet with 300µ EtOH 70%.
Remove EtOH and dry pellets.
Elute in 20µl TE pH 8.0
Centrifuge at 12,000 g for 10 minutes at 4°C

Follow the protocol provided by Oxford Nanopore technology ( Genomic_DNA_by_Ligation_SQK-LSK110) with the following modification: -Use 0.3 to 1 µg of DNA per library -For a better library preparation increase the End-Prep step up to 20 minutes at 20°C and Ligation step incubation to at least 1h - Elute in Tris-HCl 10 mM. - LFB was used for final size selection step - Quantify DNA using the Qubit dsDNA HS Assay Kit (Q33230) to check yield.
Sequence during 72h on v9.4.1 flow cell FLO-MIN106.1 or FLO-PRO002 in MinION or PromethION sequencer, respectively.

Extraction Buffer (EB) 1 To prepare 50mlm of fresh EB1 buffer %s %s Extraction Buffer (EB) 1for 50 ml:Final Concentration2M sucrose10 ml 0.4M 1M Tris-HCl pH 80.5 ml10mM 1M MgCl20.5ml 10mM14.3M BME17.5 µl 5mM+ PIs (1 tablet per 50mls)

Nuclear Preparation Buffer (NPB) To prepare 10ml of fresh NPB: %s %s Nuclear Preparation Buffer (NPB)Volume for 10mlFinal Concentration0.5M MOPS pH7400µl20 mM 5M NaCl80 µl40 mM 1M KCl900µl90 mM 0.5 M EDTA40µl2 mM 250mM EGTA20 µl0.5 mM 3.5M spermidine1.2µl0.5 mM 70 mM spermine28.5µl0.2 mM

Plant-Tween-Wash-Buffer (PTWB) To prepare 3ml of fresh PTWB: %s %s 20% Tween-2030 µl 0.2% Tween-201M pH7,5 HEPES-KOH60 µl 20 mM pH7,5 HEPES-KOH5M NaCl90 µl 150 mM NaClPI Mini300 µlPI 1/10Stock solution 3.5M0,4 µlSpermidine 0,5 mM 2530 µlH20

Reagents: for m6A reaction EcoGII/ rCutSmart/ SAM (M0603S New England Biolabs) for library preparation: NEBNext Companion Module for Oxford Nanopore Ligation Seq (E7180S New England Biolabs) SQK-LSK110 (Oxford Nanopore Technologies) for nanopore sequencing: FLO-MIN106.1 or FLO-PRO002 (Oxford Nanopore Technologies)
